name: pytest-html
description: Pytest plugin generating self-contained HTML reports for test runs, with embedded test results, screenshots and custom metadata.

seo.title: pytest-html — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: pytest-html: Pytest plugin generating self-contained HTML reports for test runs, with embedded test results, screenshots and custom metadata.

when_to_use: Self-contained HTML test reports with embedded assets
Attach screenshots to failing tests automatically
Custom metadata columns in HTML report tables
Share test results with stakeholders via HTML artifact

pros: Self-contained HTML reports, no server needed
Easy to share via CI artifacts
Works with Selenium and Playwright tests
cons: Large reports get slow to open in browser
review.verdict: A quick way to share pytest results, but teams needing polished dashboards should look at Allure instead.
review.best_for: Teams needing shareable test artifacts from CI without extra infrastructure
review.not_for: Organizations wanting rich dashboards where Allure or ReportPortal shine
